name: BUBBLE

meta.form: bubble chart: scatter plus an area-coded third measure
meta.data_required: entities with two positional measures + one size measure; under ~15 points

see_instead.when: the third measure adds nothing to the story

use_when: two related measures plus a weight (budget, volume, headcount)
the big-and-bad quadrant story: position shows risk, size shows stake
not_when: the size measure is decorative (use CH-COR-01)
sizes within +/-20% of each other (area differences invisible)
more than ~15 bubbles (labels and circles collide)

data_shape.title: string, action title naming the point where size and position compound
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit_x: string appended to the max x tick
data_shape.unit_y: string appended to the max y tick
data_shape.points: array of {label, x >= 0, y >= 0, size > 0, highlight?}

scale.algorithm: axes as CH-COR-01; radius = sqrt(size/max_size) * bubble_max_r, min 4 (AREA proportional, never radius)

rules: bubble AREA is proportional to the size measure (radius by square root), never radius-proportional
what size encodes is stated in the title or eyebrow, never in a legend
every bubble labeled; one highlight maximum
anti_patterns: animating bubbles over time in a static deliverable
qa: title compounds position and size with numbers
